hypothesis: Combining EMA crossover with Stochastic RSI and Volume Oscillator creates a robust momentum signal that filters out weak breakouts, while ATR-based risk management ensures position sizing adapts to volatility and Keltner Channel regime filtering prevents trading during low-volatility or choppy conditions

Combining EMA crossovers with stochastic overbought conditions and volume oscillator confirms strong momentum entries while filtering false signals. ATR-based risk management ensures position sizing adapts to volatility, improving risk-reward ratios in trending markets.
